caption: A man with light-colored, spiked hair is seated in a studio setting, wearing glasses, black headphones, a white long-sleeved shirt, and a small red and gold bow tie. He sits behind a black microphone, facing slightly to the left. The background consists of a wall covered in numerous framed photographs and a black garment mannequin. On-screen logos in the lower-left and lower-right corners read "TALK" and "PODCAST" along with "OSS TALK JOY". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar seated position, though his facial expression shifts slightly. He appears to be speaking or listening, with subtle movements of his mouth and head as the frames progress. The camera remains static, capturing a medium shot of the man from the waist up within the studio environment.
